personal.name: Fredy Martinez
personal.description: Frontend Developer with 5+ years of experience in web development, specialized in React and modern technologies like Laravel. Worked on e-commerce projects, real estate portals and corporate solutions, integrating APIs and optimizing performance. Experience with Git, GitHub, Netlify deployments and agile methodologies (Scrum).

services.title: Frontend Development
services.description: Building modern, responsive user interfaces with React, TypeScript and Next.js. Focus on performance, accessibility and clean component architecture.

services.title: Web Applications
services.description: Full-stack web solutions using PHP and Laravel on the backend, integrated with REST APIs, e-commerce platforms and corporate portals.

services.title: Mobile Development
services.description: Cross-platform mobile applications built with React Native, delivering native experiences for both iOS and Android from a single codebase.

projects.title: AboutLink Me
projects.description: A 'link in bio' platform with an admin panel to manage profile, links, projects and customizable design.

projects.title: Incidencias Bomberos
projects.description: Web app to search and visualize firefighter incidents in real time, with Python/Flask scraping backend and React frontend.

projects.title: DevsTagram
projects.description: Personal social network with user registration, photo publishing, comments and likes.

projects.title: CurrencyConvert
projects.description: Currency conversion app that lets users enter amounts and select source and target currencies to get the final conversion value.

projects.title: JournalApp
projects.description: Online journal to log daily activities with comments and images, with Firebase authentication.

projects.title: Computek E.I.R.L
projects.description: Tech store website that increased sales by 40% in the first 4 months and boosted online visibility through SEO.

projects.title: SATTRACK
projects.description: Real-time satellite monitoring dashboard with 3D Earth visualization, SGP4 orbital propagation via Web Workers and live data from CelesTrak and NASA. Includes Starlink constellation, solar events and orbital metrics by type (LEO, MEO, GEO).
